name: ANC_PER_ABS_SHIFT_CALC_ENT
description: This table holds information of the earned date based calculated entries corresponding to the related shift breakdown.

columns.Name: PER_ABS_SHIFT_CALC_ENTRY_ID
columns.Comments: Key identifier for breakdown of calculated records.

columns.Name: PER_ABS_SHIFT_BREAKDOWN_ID
columns.Comments: Key identifier of parent shift breakdown record.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise identifier.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person identifier.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Assignment identifier.

columns.Name: PER_ABSENCE_ENTRY_ID
columns.Comments: Person absence entry identifier.

columns.Name: ABSENCE_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Absence type identifier.

columns.Name: UOM
columns.Comments: Unit of measure.

columns.Name: START_DATETIME
columns.Comments: Start date and time of the shift calculate entry.

columns.Name: END_DATETIME
columns.Comments: End date and time of the shift calculated entry.

columns.Name: DURATION
columns.Comments: Duration of the shift calculated entry.

columns.Name: DURATION_IN_MILLISECONDS
columns.Comments: Duration of the shift calculated entry in milliseconds.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_TYPE
columns.Comments: This denotes time or elapsed schedule type.

columns.Name: EARNED_DATE
columns.Comments: This denotes the earned day.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
